data.title: Timeline for Selling a House in Greeneville, Tennessee, Explained in HelloNation by Real Estate Expert Mark Williams
data.description: In Greeneville, Tennessee on April 10, 2026, an article was released discussing the process of selling a house from listing to closing and the various factors that can affect the time it takes to sell a property. Homeowners in Greeneville should be aware of what to anticipate when planning the timeline for selling a house. HelloNation provides information on this, offering insights for sellers in this area.

data.title: UBS Downgrades ServiceNow On AI Model Threat, Budget Pressure
data.description: ServiceNow's stock price experienced a decline following a downgrade from UBS, who cited concerns over the impact of AI coding tools on the software company. The downgrade was based on the perceived threat posed by the advancement of AI technologies. This news was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Pentagon Awards $4.76 Billion Missile Contract As Iran War Dents Supplies
data.description: Lockheed Martin secured a contract from the Department of Defense for Patriot missiles on Thursday. This decision comes in the midst of dwindling munitions supplies due to the ongoing conflict with Iran. The Pentagon awarded the missile contract valued at $4.76 billion as a response to the pressing need for additional armaments.

data.title: CoreWeave Adds Anthropic As AI Cloud Computing Customer
data.description: CoreWeave experienced a surge in its stock value following the revelation of a long-term agreement with Anthropic, a leading artificial intelligence system producer. The provider of cloud computing services secured a lucrative deal with Anthropic, solidifying its position in the AI cloud computing sector. This new partnership is projected to significantly boost CoreWeave's revenue and market share.

JPM: The consensus is that Anthropic’s 10-trillion-parameter model, Mythos, was trained on NVL72. *JPM: Our analysts are not currently seeing anything that would suggest Anthropic is developing its own ASIC. $NVDA

data.title: CPI Better Than Feared But Oil Prices Still High; S&P 500 Futures Rise (Live Coverage)
data.description: In March, consumer price index (CPI) inflation saw a significant increase due to soaring oil prices amidst the conflict in Iran. However, the core CPI, which excludes volatile food and energy prices, remained relatively stable. The S&P 500 index has been on a winning streak for seven consecutive sessions. Following the release of the CPI data, it was found that the actual numbers were better than anticipated, but concerns remain regarding the high oil prices. As a result, S&P 500 futures are on the rise. This information was covered in live updates on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Meta's Muse Spark AI Model Impressed. Here's The Next Test In Race With Google, OpenAI.
data.description: The stock of Meta surged for a second consecutive day following positive feedback from Wall Street analysts regarding the advancements in the AI models of the parent company of Facebook. The recent success of Meta's Muse Spark AI model was well-received by analysts, with expectations now focusing on the next challenge in the competitive landscape against Google and OpenAI.
Trump's Iran War Sends Gasoline To Biggest Monthly Surge Since 1967 — 6 Energy Stocks To Watch

data.title: Miracell Receives FDA 510(k) Clearance for SMART M-CELL PRP Concentration System and SMART M-CELL Bone Marrow Concentration System
data.description: Leading stem cell technology company Miracell, based in SEOUL, South Korea, revealed on April 10, 2026, that their new system for extracting growth factors from blood and bone marrow has proven to be comparable to existing methods and ensures a notably high viability of cells. The company has recently received approval from the U.S. FDA through the 510(k) pathway to market this innovative system.
J.P. Morgan Structured Products B.V. published its 2025 Annual Report.
IRAN'S PARLIAMENT SPEAKER STATES THAT A CEASEFIRE IN LEBANON AND THE RELEASE OF IRANIAN ASSETS MUST HAPPEN BEFORE NEGOTIATIONS CAN BEGIN.

data.title: CUPE Long Term Care Workers File Notice to Strike
data.description: In Halifax, NS, long term care workers from 22 facilities have issued a 48-hour notice to strike this morning. It is anticipated that more facilities will join the strike in the upcoming week. The initial wave of the strike is expected to involve over 2,200 workers picketing across the province starting on April 13 at 7 AM. Ty Loppie, the Communications Officer of CUPE's Long Term and Community Care Committee, emphasized the need for health care workers to receive a fair wage without having to resort to strike action.
MEXICO'S PEMEX SAYS OLMECA REFINERY 'REMAINS SAFE AND OPERATIONAL' AFTER THURSDAY'S FIRE

data.title: BTC surges to $73K with cool US CPI; Gas prices hit 60-year record high, driving new local highs.
data.description: Bitcoin made a new push towards reaching its highest levels locally despite a significant surge in gas prices, following the release of US CPI data that came in lower than anticipated.

data.title: White House cautions staff amidst insider trading worries linked to Iran bets and prediction markets; Reuters notes suspicious activity.
data.description: According to reports, White House employees have been cautioned against disclosing sensitive data following questionable trades in oil futures linked to Iran and increased attention on prediction markets.
KUWAIT'S ARMY SAYS IRANIAN ATTACK TARGETED NATIONAL GUARD FACILITIES, CAUSED INJURIES TO A NUMBER OF PERSONNEL

data.title: DaBella Opens Its 68th Location in Fairfield, California, Marking a Milestone Year of National Growth
data.description: A company specializing in home improvement, DaBella, is rapidly expanding across the United States and is now focusing on Northern California. The family-owned business is widely recognized for its high-quality services and strong community values. As of April 10, 2026, the company operates from its headquarters in Austin, Texas, and continues to grow its presence in various regions. DaBella's commitment to excellence has resulted in significant growth and positive reception in the market, making it a prominent player in the industry.
UKRAINE'S METINVEST ANNOUNCES PLANS TO REPAY BOND DUE THIS MONTH AFTER CONSIDERING OPTIONS TO EXTEND MATURITY AND ISSUE A NEW BOND.

data.title: Mantle Becomes One of the First Ethereum L2s to Bring Tokenized Equities to On-Chain Liquidity with xStocks and Bybit
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on April 10, 2026, Mantle, a high-performance distribution layer for real-world assets (RWAs) that bridges traditional finance and on-chain liquidity, partnered with Bybit, the leading global cryptocurrency exchange, to launch xStocks integration. This collaboration signifies an important milestone in the industry, allowing for seamless trading between RWAs and cryptocurrencies. Stay tuned for exciting developments in this space.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Wavers On Surprise CPI Inflation Data; Nvidia Chipmaker TSMC Jumps (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index showed fluctuations in response to a surprising Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation report. TSMC, the chipmaker for Nvidia, experienced a significant increase in its stock value due to robust sales. The stock market was closely monitored as these developments unfolded.
